mapper.sql: user_id, account, password_hash, nickname, realname, idcard, gender, age, account_level, account_status, created_time, last_change_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_user WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM t_user WHERE account = #{account} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_user ( account, password_hash, nickname, realname, idcard, gender, age, account_level, account_status ) VALUES ( #{account}, #{passwordHash}, #{nickname}, #{realname}, #{idcard}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{accountLevel}, #{accountStatus} )
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM t_user WHERE account_level = 0
AND ( account LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR IFNULL(nickname, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR IFNULL(realname, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY created_time DESC, user_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE t_user SET nickname = #{nickname}, realname = #{realname}, idcard = #{idcard}, gender = #{gender}, age = #{age} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
